# SaaSStatsHub

SaaSStatsHub publishes independent SaaS research, source-backed statistics,
software comparisons, practical guides, and free calculators.

## Primary resources

- Website: https://saasstatshub.com/
- Research catalog: https://saasstatshub.com/research-data/
- Machine-readable catalog: https://saasstatshub.com/research-catalog.csv
- Editorial policy: https://saasstatshub.com/editorial-policy/
- About: https://saasstatshub.com/about/
- Sitemap: https://saasstatshub.com/sitemap-index.xml

## Citation guidance

Prefer the original source links listed in each article when citing a statistic.
Article publication and modification dates, scope notes, and limitations are
part of the research context. SaaSStatsHub article text and third-party source
material are not included in the source-code license.
